en-US.title: Ridhi – India Social & Dating
en-US.subtitle: Meet Indians. Chat. Find Love.
en-US.description:
🇮🇳 India's #1 Social Networking & Dating App

Ridhi brings millions of Indians together — to share moments, make real friends, and find love, all in their own language.

──────────────────────────
✨ WHY RIDHI?
──────────────────────────

🔥 SOCIAL FEED & REELS
Share photos, short videos, and reels with your city, your people, your culture. Follow creators, react with emojis, and go viral across India.

💕 DATING & MATCHING
Swipe, match, and connect with people who share your interests, language, and values. Smart AI filters help you find the right match in your state or anywhere in India.

💬 CHAT IN YOUR LANGUAGE
Message in Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Bengali, Marathi, Gujarati, Kannada, Punjabi, and 5 more Indian languages. Voice messages, emoji, GIFs — the way Indians really talk.

🎥 LIVE STREAMS & AUDIO ROOMS
Go live, host audio rooms, join communities, and grow your following. Earn coins and become a verified creator.

🏘️ COMMUNITIES
Join groups based on your city, college, interests, and culture. 10+ categories including Cricket, Bollywood, Food, Tech, Fitness, and more.

🎮 GAMES & PK BATTLES
Play casual games with friends, battle other streamers, and win prizes on the leaderboard.

🪙 COIN WALLET & CREATOR EARNINGS
Send virtual gifts, earn coins from your content, and withdraw real money. India's first creator monetisation built for regional audiences.

📣 BUSINESS ADS PLATFORM
Create targeted ad campaigns for your business. Reach users in specific Indian states with Hindi, regional language, and interest-based targeting.

──────────────────────────
🛡️ SAFE & TRUSTED
──────────────────────────
• Phone-verified accounts
• AI-powered content moderation
• Report & block in one tap
• KYC verification for creators
• End-to-end encrypted chats

──────────────────────────
🌍 BUILT FOR INDIA
──────────────────────────
• 13 Indian languages supported
• State & city-based discovery
• Lightweight & optimised for Indian networks
• Dark mode & accessibility-first design
• Works on 2G/3G/4G/5G

──────────────────────────
📲 GET STARTED FREE
──────────────────────────
Download Ridhi, sign up with your phone in 30 seconds, and start connecting with millions of Indians today. Love, friendship, community — it all starts here.

Follow us: @ridhiapp
Website: https://ridhi.app
Support: support@ridhi.app
en-US.releaseNotes:
🎉 What's New in Ridhi v1.0

• Smart state-based ad targeting — reach users in specific Indian states
• Ad image upload with live campaign preview
• Faster app startup — 60% lighter on first load
• Icon rendering improved across all screens
• Bug fixes and performance improvements

Love Ridhi? Leave us a ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ review — it helps more Indians discover us!

hi.title: रिधि – भारतीय सोशल ऐप
hi.subtitle: मिलें, बात करें, प्यार पाएं
hi.description:
🇮🇳 भारत का नंबर 1 सोशल नेटवर्किंग और डेटिंग ऐप

रिधि पर लाखों भारतीयों से मिलें — अपनी भाषा में बात करें, रील्स शेयर करें, और सच्चा प्यार पाएं।

✨ रिधि क्यों?
• अपनी भाषा में चैट करें — हिंदी, तमिल, तेलुगु, बंगाली और 9 अन्य भाषाएं
• स्वाइप करें और अपने राज्य के लोगों से मिलें
• रील्स और लाइव स्ट्रीम से पैसे कमाएं
• अपने शहर और कॉलेज के कम्युनिटी में जुड़ें

आज ही डाउनलोड करें — बिल्कुल फ्री!
hi.releaseNotes:
🎉 रिधि v1.0 में नया क्या है
• राज्य-आधारित विज्ञापन टार्गेटिंग
• तेज़ ऐप लोडिंग
• बग फिक्स और बेहतर परफॉर्मेंस

reviewInformation.notes: This is a social networking and dating app for Indian users. Login with phone number OTP. A demo OTP will be shown on screen in demo mode. Please use the demo credentials provided above to access the app without real SMS.

en-US.title: Ridhi – India Social Dating App
en-US.shortDescription: Meet Indians, share reels & find love in 13 languages. India's #1 app.
en-US.fullDescription:
🇮🇳 RIDHI — INDIA'S #1 SOCIAL NETWORKING & DATING APP

Connect with millions of Indians, share your moments, and find love — all in your language, your way.

──────────────────────────
🔥 TOP FEATURES
──────────────────────────

📸 SOCIAL FEED & VIRAL REELS
Post photos, short videos, and reels. Go viral across India. React, comment, and share with millions of users from your city and beyond.

💕 SMART DATING & MATCHING
Swipe right, match, and chat. Advanced AI filters find people by state, language, interests, and age. Your perfect match is waiting on Ridhi.

💬 CHAT IN 13 INDIAN LANGUAGES
Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Bengali, Marathi, Gujarati, Kannada, Punjabi, Malayalam, Odia, Assamese, Urdu, and English. Voice messages, GIFs, and stickers.

🎥 LIVE STREAMS & AUDIO ROOMS
Go live from anywhere in India. Host audio rooms, earn virtual gifts, and grow your fanbase. Verified creator programme available.

🏘️ 10+ COMMUNITIES
Join groups by city, college, interest. Cricket, Bollywood, Food, Fitness, Tech, Travel, Business, and more.

🎮 GAMES & PK BATTLES
Play mini-games, challenge streamers in PK battles, and win real prizes on weekly leaderboards.

🪙 EARN REAL MONEY
Creators earn through coins, gifts, brand deals, and the Ridhi Partner Programme. Withdraw directly to UPI or bank account.

📣 BUSINESS ADVERTISING
Businesses can create targeted ads reaching users in specific Indian states with Hindi and regional language targeting. Start from ₹100/day.

──────────────────────────
🛡️ SAFETY & PRIVACY
──────────────────────────
✅ Phone-verified accounts only
✅ AI-powered content moderation 24/7
✅ End-to-end encrypted private chats
✅ KYC verification for top creators
✅ One-tap block & report
✅ Privacy controls for every post

──────────────────────────
🌍 MADE FOR INDIA
──────────────────────────
🗣 13 Indian languages
📍 State & city-based discovery
⚡ Optimised for Indian networks (2G/3G/4G/5G)
🌙 Dark mode & Light mode
♿ Accessibility-first design
📱 Works on all Android devices (Android 6+)

──────────────────────────
📲 JOIN MILLIONS OF INDIANS
──────────────────────────
Sign up free in 30 seconds with your phone number. No email required. Ridhi — where India connects.

🌐 ridhi.app | 📧 support@ridhi.app | 📱 @ridhiapp

hi-IN.title: रिधि – भारतीय सोशल डेटिंग ऐप
hi-IN.shortDescription: 13 भाषाओं में मिलें, रील्स शेयर करें और प्यार पाएं। भारत का #1 ऐप।
hi-IN.fullDescription:
🇮🇳 रिधि — भारत का नंबर 1 सोशल नेटवर्किंग और डेटिंग ऐप

लाखों भारतीयों से जुड़ें, अपने पल शेयर करें और अपनी भाषा में प्यार पाएं।

🔥 मुख्य विशेषताएं:
• सोशल फीड और वायरल रील्स
• स्मार्ट डेटिंग और मैचिंग (AI-आधारित)
• 13 भारतीय भाषाओं में चैट
• लाइव स्ट्रीम और ऑडियो रूम
• 10+ कम्युनिटी
• पैसे कमाएं — UPI पर निकालें

30 सेकंड में मुफ़्त साइन अप करें!
